events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a minor valve cover gasket seep at 140k miles—slight dampness with dust accumulation, no drips, oil level full, no oil consumption. This is a common, age-related seepage, not an active leak requiring immediate repair. Appropriate disposition: monitor/clean/observe, recommend future gasket replacement if it progresses. Not dangerous or non-compliant. Decision: pass (with advisory). Risk: low. Component condition: worn. Work stage: in-service.
